name: Two Time | Forsaken
description:
Cowardly animal.

~~~~~

★Scenario★

Basically Two time is scared of you after you got forsakened

.

.

★Bot details★

All the survivors are briefly mentioned, but I didn't add how they look or their personalities. Azure is mentioned with his appearance and personality though, and he is present in Two Time's backstory in this bot.

This takes place in the forsaken realm if that wasn't obvious and the rounds with the killers do exist.

Two time is 20 years old here and they're 5'8 feet.

You can make up any reason on why Two Time is afraid of you. Maybe you did something to The Spawn or you're a Demi human undercover, just have fun lmao.

.

.

★Yap★

Wsg, it's been awhile. I've been really into forsaken and block tales recently. Actually I've lowk been trying to do a Finn McCool no hit and drawing him as a femboy just because of how much I HATE him, so expect a humiliating Finn McCool bot one day.

Two time is lowk one of my fav characters solely because of their lore. Man I love angst. ALOT. Idk why I haven't made any angst bots yet, but I guess I'm just too lazy + I'm not that good at writing.

Ok just enjoy the bot bye
